reference: THERE WAS A CRUDE LIGHTING SYSTEM HERE PUT UP BY THE CITIZENS AT THE FRONT OF EACH BUILDING A DIM PHOSPHOR BULB GLOWED WHEN DARKNESS FELL THEY WOULD HAVE NOTHING ELSE TO SEE BY
text: There was a crude lighting system here, put up by the citizens. At the front of each building a dim phosphor bulb glowed; when darkness fell, they would have nothing else to see by.
